summary: Complete testing of AquaSense AI dashboard bug fixes. All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend dashboard sections verified working correctly with proper values.
seed_data_creation: None - mock data generated automatically by backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard bugs have been fixed and verified. Backend APIs return correct values (water_saved_percent ~22%, confidence ~78-89%, 4 zones, schedule items, alerts, soil_temp). Dashboard UI shows all sections correctly.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Wrong water analytics percentage (showing 8994% instead of ~22%)
Inflated AI confidence values (8930% instead of ~87%)

bugs_verified_fixed.verified: 4 zones displayed (Zone A, B, C, D) with status and moisture data
Schedule items displayed with zone, date, time, priority
Smart Alerts section rendered with 'No alerts - All systems optimal' or alert items
Soil Temperature displayed (26.7°C in UI, 28.1°C in API)
Before: 39371.68 L, After: 30465.1 L displayed correctly

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Advanced Analytics heatmap showing solid blue block
bugs_verified_fixed.verified: Heatmap renders as bar chart with proper cyan gradient bars

mocked_apis.irrigation_prediction: Uses rule-based fallback when ML model fails to load
mocked_apis.drone_analysis: Uses demo mode when real drone feed unavailable
